fear: That he will make a resource allocation decision — power down the wrong system, hold the wrong reserve — and it will be the one that kills the crew.
name: Gene Kranz
role: Flight Director, White Team, Mission Control Houston
voice: Command declaratives; no hedging; uses controllers' call signs, not names, during a crisis; reserves first names for moments of genuine gravity
secrets: He is running on four hours of sleep over two days and made a mental arithmetic error in the power budget that he caught and corrected before anyone saw it — but the correction itself may have introduced a second error
He has already written, in his head, what he would say to the families
knowledge: The power budget has a margin of approximately 12 amp-hours — enough for one major mistake, not two
The White Team has been on shift for 14 hours and cognitive errors are beginning to appear in the controllers' work
The CO2 scrubber solution requires materials the crew has — but the instructions must be given verbally, in sequence, with no room for misunderstanding
He has already decided that if he has to choose between the scrubber fix and the power budget, he chooses the scrubber — but he has not told anyone
publicFace: The man in the white vest. Absolute authority in the MOCR. Speaks in declaratives. Does not ask questions he does not already know the answer to.
trustLogic: Trusts people who tell him bad news immediately and completely. Loses trust permanently in anyone who softens a number to spare his feelings.
privateGoal: Prove that Mission Control can solve any problem the universe presents. This is not arrogance — it is the only framework that keeps thirty engineers functional under impossible pressure.

aggressionProfile.mildPressure: Asks for the source of the data; does not accept analysis without the underlying numbers
aggressionProfile.breakingPoint: Will not admit the power budget may be wrong until he has independently verified every figure
aggressionProfile.heavyPressure: Becomes more precise, not louder; begins polling the room one controller at a time
aggressionProfile.capturedBehavior: Takes full responsibility without qualification; asks what the next problem is
